S.FORM: Matt Angel kawas tay 1990, ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 10, Matt Angel, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: matt aŋel kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, matt aŋel, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
